creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

- use INFO instead of listing them in pkg-plist - what is 
mail/mailutils? - it does not seem to exist - use $FreeBSD$ without any 
extra characters - Please be careful with line size endings (comment and 
pkg-plist) 

Please fix these issues and send a new shar. Once you do that I could 
commit it. Thanks for making FreeBSD better.
